compiled_state.title: Pre-existing CI failures: bash-suite REPO_ROOT leak (.tickets-tracker) + macOS tmp-cleaner race
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. On a CLEAN checkout (no pre-existing .tickets-tracker), run `pytest -m "not integration"` (as CI does).
2. The bash-suite collector runs test-ticket-{list-descendants,next-batch,purge-bridge}-dispatcher.sh.

## Expected
All suites pass; no entries leaked into REPO_ROOT.

## Actual
Two distinct CI failures (run 27437641565, both runners, on origin/main):
1. REAL: `Test leaked new entries into REPO_ROOT: ['.tickets-tracker']`. The no-args/arity tests in 3
   dispatcher suites invoke an auto-initing command (list-descendants/next-batch/purge-bridge) WITHOUT a
   sandboxed TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR, so _ensure_initialized auto-inits .tickets-tracker INTO the checkout,
   tripping the conftest leak guard. Masked locally because the dev checkout already has a .tickets-tracker
   (dogfood store) — the guard sees no NEW entry. Gate-command arity tests (check-ac/clarity/quality/summary)
   do NOT leak (those arms intentionally skip _ensure_initialized).
2. SPURIOUS: ~909 FileNotFoundError errors — the macOS tmp-cleaner reaps pytest's default /tmp/pytest-of-*
   basetemp mid-run (10-16 min). The CI pytest step passed no fixed --basetemp.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The 3 no-args arity tests sandbox TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR so auto-init cannot land in the checkout
- [ ] Fix is behavior-preserving (same usage output + exit; proved no-leak in a clean-checkout simulation)
- [ ] CI pytest step pins a fixed --basetemp (under runner.temp, not /tmp) + -p no:cacheprovider
- [ ] The 3 patched suites pass via the collector

comments.body: FIXED (commit 9760b2b2). (1) Sandboxed TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR on the 3 no-args arity invocations; proved behavior-preserving (same usage+exit 1) and no-leak in a fresh-git-repo simulation (WITHOUT env -> leaks; WITH env -> no leak). (2) CI pytest step now pins --basetemp=${{ runner.temp }}/rebar-basetemp + -p no:cacheprovider. The 3 patched suites pass via the collector (3 passed). Standalone pre-Tier-E hygiene commit; unblocks CI green on push.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
